{"type":"tool_use","id":"tool_GvMoLzlOQ56VJjDFNcdVFm0v","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/Users/xin/auto-skills/.claude/worktrees/worker-task-9/domain-tool-core/scripts/mindkeeper-hook.sh","content":"#!/bin/bash
#
# MindKeeper Hook Script
# Called by MindKeeper MCP on session start to auto-update project index
#
# Usage: ./mindkeeper-hook.sh [path]
#   path: Optional starting path for git root detection (defaults to current directory)
#

set -e

# Colors for output (to stderr)
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Log to stderr for debugging
log_info() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[mindkeeper-hook]${NC} $1" >&2
}

# Get the directory where this script is located
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"

# Get the project root (parent of scripts directory)
PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"

# Starting path for git root detection
START_PATH="${1:-$(pwd)}"

log_info "MindKeeper hook triggered"
log_info "Script directory: $SCRIPT_DIR"
log_info "Project root: $PROJECT_ROOT"
log_info "Start path: $START_PATH"

# Check if Node.js is available
if ! command -v node &> /dev/null; then
    log_error "Node.js is not installed or not in PATH"
    exit 1
fi

# Check if the bridge module exists
BRIDGE_MODULE="$PROJECT_ROOT/src/integrations/mindkeeper-bridge.js"
if [ ! -f "$BRIDGE_MODULE" ]; then
    log_error "Bridge module not found at: $BRIDGE_MODULE"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Bridge module found: $BRIDGE_MODULE"

# Run the bridge module using Node.js
# The module will auto-detect git root and run incremental index
node -e "
const bridge = require('$BRIDGE_MODULE');
const result = bridge.onSessionStart('$START_PATH');
if (result) {
    console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));
    process.exit(0);
} else {
    console.error('Failed to run index update');
    process.exit(1);
}
"

EXIT_CODE=$?

if [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 0 ]; then
    log_info "MindKeeper hook completed successfully"
else
    log_error "MindKeeper hook failed with exit code $EXIT_CODE"
    exit $EXIT_CODE
fi
"}}
